title: Toast notification container with auto-dismiss and stacking
purpose: Displays active toast notifications in a fixed bottom-right container, limiting visibility to 5 toasts and handling automatic dismissal.
module_context: Exports a ToastContainer React component that consumes notifications from a global store and renders them with automatic stacking and dismissal.

steps.content: Access the global notification store to retrieve all active toasts.
Limit the displayed toasts to the most recent 5 entries.
Render a fixed-position container with vertical stacking for the toasts.
Map each visible toast to a Toast component with dismissal handler.
